_note: Content for the Imprint and Privacy Policy pages. Replace placeholder text in square brackets with your own details.

sections.h: Responsible for content pursuant to § 18 Para. 2 MStV

p: Type Foundry Terms is a private, non-commercial information project. Content is compiled with the greatest possible care — however, no claim is made as to completeness, currency, or accuracy. The current EULA of each individual foundry is always the authoritative document.
This site links to external websites of the listed foundries. I have no influence over their content; responsibility lies solely with the respective provider.
The typeface names, trademarks, and logos mentioned are the property of their respective foundries and are referenced here for informational purposes only.
This website does not collect personal data. There is no registration, no contact forms, no cookies, no tracking, and no analytics tools. No data is shared with or sold to third parties.

When you access the site, the hosting provider may store technically necessary access data (e.g. IP address, date and time, page accessed, browser type) in server log files. This is done to ensure reliable operation (Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. f GDPR) and is not merged with other data. Details are governed by the host's privacy policy. The site is hosted on GitHub Pages (GitHub, Inc., 88 Colin P. Kelly Jr. Street, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA).
This site loads fonts via the jsDelivr CDN. When loading, a connection to CDN servers may be established and your IP address transmitted. If you want to avoid this, fonts can also be self-hosted.

You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, and restriction of processing at any time, as well as the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. As virtually no personal data is processed here, this generally only applies to the host's log files.
